summary: Iteration 95: Cosmic Mood Ring & Session Replay/Download - All features verified working. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components functional.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed sessions and mood entries during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 95 features fully tested. Key data-testids: cosmic-mood-ring, quick-mood-toggle, quick-mood-panel, quick-mood-{happy/peaceful/energized/grateful/stressed/anxious/sad/tired}, full-mood-tracker-link, mood-ring-navigate, tab-live, tab-schedule, tab-past, past-card-{id}, replay-btn-{id}, download-btn-{id}, replay-modal, replay-toggle-chat, replay-download. Backend endpoints: GET /api/mood-ring, POST /api/moods, GET /api/live/past, GET /api/live/sessions/{id}/recording, GET /api/live/sessions/{id}/download, POST /api/live/sessions/{id}/end (creates recording).

cosmic_mood_ring_visibility.details: Cosmic Mood Ring card visible on personalized home page (/) when logged in. Shows animated orb, mood message, dominant mood, and energy trend.

mood_ring_navigation.details: Clicking the ring card navigates to /mood page.

quick_log_panel.details: Quick Log button opens panel with 8 mood options: Happy, Peaceful, Energized, Grateful, Stressed, Anxious, Sad, Tired.

quick_log_mood_api.details: Selecting a mood calls POST /api/moods with mood, intensity=5, note=''. Toast confirms logging. Ring data refreshes.

full_mood_tracker_link.details: 'Open Full Mood Tracker' link at bottom of quick log panel navigates to /mood.

session_end_creates_recording.details: POST /api/live/sessions/{id}/end creates recording in session_recordings collection with chat_log and command_log.

past_sessions_list.details: GET /api/live/past returns list of recordings without chat_log/command_log for performance.

recording_details.details: GET /api/live/sessions/{id}/recording returns full recording with chat_log and command_log.

download_recording.details: GET /api/live/sessions/{id}/download returns JSON file with Content-Disposition header for download.

live_sessions_3_tabs.details: /live page has 3 tabs: Live & Upcoming, Recurring Schedule, Past Sessions. All tabs clickable and show correct content.

past_sessions_cards.details: Past Sessions tab shows recording cards with title, host, duration, date, Replay and Download buttons.

replay_modal.details: Clicking Replay opens modal with command timeline player (shows 'No guided commands' for API-created sessions), chat sidebar, toggle chat button, and download button.

download_button.details: Download button on cards and in replay modal triggers file download.
